name: Sour Cream Cherry Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Butter two (8") square cake pans.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with sugar until well combined.
Add eggs one at a time and beat well. Add sour cream and mix thoroughly.
In a small bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture. The batter will be stiff.
Stir in the vanilla, zest, and preserves. Spread batter into pans.
Bake 20-30 minutes or until an inserted toothpick comes out clean.
